title: CP9 Drops the Disguise
description: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Iceburg, Blueno, Nico Robin, Franky, Rob Lucci. Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: seeking, studying, and deciphering the true history...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: So you know about that too...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ... If you are with the CPP...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Then you must've left the straw hats...

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Because once the weapons are revived...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The truth is, I'm very much involved...

summary: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
